creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
What I see is that I should apply this fix :

https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=9873b171697033f9f19608d98bcd1c16cacb92af

but I also see that it has already been applied :

https://ibb.co/cKgCZWJg

but I get the rainbow screen anyway. 

I would like to understand why,where is the error,how can I fix it ?

thanks.
